deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Listing terminated May 29. Sellers moving back in to make updates and repairs before relisting. Was underwater by approximately 93K to 143K. Short sale path was primary option discussed.
deals.next: Await sellers to complete repairs and relist property

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Sellers plan to relist after repairs.
Called sellers. Chandler was laid off. Three paths presented: short sale, VA assumption, bring cash to close.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA, 1809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Payoff ~257K. Net sheet shows 295K recommended asking price nets ~14.7K to sellers. CMA pulled May 15. Divorce situation. Colton being considered for contractor work at Priority Bank property.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Schedule professional photos. Get listing agreement signed.

logs.m: Met at property. Payoff confirmed 255K as of Feb 2026. CMA pulled. Net sheet built.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA, listed May 14 at 259900. Second-look buyers interested. Potential hairline foundation crack. Roof claim moving forward with insurance. Sellers relocating to NC mid-June.
deals.next: Confirm tomorrow showing time. Follow up with second-look buyers agent. Monitor for backup offers.

logs.m: Second-look buyers came back for viewing. They love floorplan. Pre-inspection report offered.
MLS live. First showing feedback received. Sign and lockbox dropped.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. Cleanup nearly complete. Electric reconnected. Flooring starts this week. Water meter pending. Three cameras installed. HouzzPro contractor managing work.
deals.next: Call utilities to confirm meter installs. Replace camera batteries. Police report follow-up. Get listing agreement to bank.

logs.m: Property visited. Flooring starts tomorrow or Thursday. Baseboards after. Water meter 1-2 days away.
Drywall crew actively patching. Photos sent to Kelly.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acre hunting property. Contract accepted at 113K from Espinoza family. EMD not yet received. TXR 1903 amendment sent to buyer agent Javier. Chicago Title handling. Steve signed T-47 via DocuSign.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received. Confirm signed TXR 1903 amendment back from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email domain.

logs.m: Steve called back. Alejandra sent new T-47. Steve completed and returned it.
New buyers Espinoza family identified. Buyer agent Javier. TXR 1903 sent for price update.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale. Cash deal 152K. Closed and funded April 26-27 2026. Military buyer via Sam VanDenheuvel. Lien resolved via Fernando Castillo signature at notary.
deals.next: Confirm commission received. Deliver Joy gift basket. Thank you notes pending.

logs.m: Transaction officially closed and funded.
Lien release signed by Fernando Castillo at notary. Delivered to Chicago Title.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal. Still actively searching. No HOA requirement firm. Rental being sold so timeline accelerated. Previously on debt payoff program Jan 7 2026.
leads.next: Revisit new construction search. Identify no-HOA builders. Confirm Zach pre-approval status.

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal. Too much for them. Still actively searching.

leads.title: Bryce & Wife
leads.detail: Met at 181 CR 7751 work site May 11. Wife is active military. Recently moved from Ohio. Currently renting. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area. VA loan eligible.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Connect with VA-approved lender.

logs.m: Met on site at Priority Bank property. Wife is active military VA buyer prospect.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship. Mom is Milagros Stringer (210-378-5147). New construction buyer. 50K down, target 1K monthly payment. Grace Gardens or similar. Rental property management also in play.
leads.next: Confirm builder visit Wed or Thu. Call Carlos McLean before visit. Get Milagros signed buyer rep agreement.

logs.m: Buyer rep sent to Milagros. Builder outreach template drafted.

leads.title: Armando
leads.detail: Referred by David Roth (210-708-5644). Employee buyer program. 50K down, target 1K monthly payment. Open to multiple builders and neighborhoods. No aging commissions if employee purchase route used.
leads.next: Get Armando contact info from David Roth. Pull new construction options from multiple builders. Set up builder visits.

logs.m: David Roth confirmed no aging commissions on employee purchase route.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through Little Red House garden group. Grief to healing through plants story. Content collaboration opportunity if permitted. Long-term trust-based relationship potential.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share healing story. Keep nurturing.

logs.m: Community contact made. Follow-up needed to deepen relationship and ask for story permission.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor Son

leads.next: Get son name and contact info from Miss Pat. Reach out gently. Assess situation.

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor son inherited property. Potential probate listing.
